rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0525 governs temporary teaching certificates for military instructors. The two provisions are unrelated.
quote: Sec. 21.0525. CERTIFICATION OF CERTAIN MILITARY INSTRUCTORS; TEMPORARY TEACHING CERTIFICATE.
_note: No overlap between proposed property-tax change and educator-certification statute.
